title: GitHub Actions Reviewer
description: AI-powered PR reviews using ChatGPT or GitHub Copilot. Posts structured inline comments, summaries, or hybrid reviews directly on your pull requests. Configurable presets from minimal to picky. Codex-style output with auto-resolve for stale threads.

title: IX Chat
description: Windows desktop tray app for AI conversations. WinUI 3 interface with system tray integration, multi-provider support, and real-time tool calling.

title: IX Tools
description: Tool packs for IX Chat and .NET integrations. OSS packs include file system, reviewer setup, event log, email, and Office docs; closed-source packs can be available in licensed private builds.

title: CLI Tools
description: Path-first onboarding in CLI and local Web UI. Built-in auto-detect preflight (doctor), multi-repo setup, auth refresh, cleanup, and maintenance flows.

title: .NET Library
description: Codex app-server client with JSON-RPC support. One-liner Easy.ChatAsync API. Full threading, login flows, and config overrides for building your own AI-powered tools.

title: PowerShell Module
description: Binary cmdlets for scripting and automation. Connect, send messages, run diagnostics, and integrate IntelligenceX into your PowerShell workflows.
